name: tripadvisor-pp-mcp
description: Every Tripadvisor Content API endpoint, plus a local store and ranked compare/best/drift commands no other Tripadvisor tool has.

tripadvisor_api_key.title: Tripadvisor Content API key
tripadvisor_api_key.description: Sets TRIPADVISOR_API_KEY for the Tripadvisor MCP server. Get a credential from https://www.tripadvisor.com/developers.
